targets.expr: label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_pv_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) /1000, "series", "PV") or label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) /1000, "series", "Grid import") or label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) * -1) /1000, "series", "Home") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",loadpoint!~"$loadpointBlocklist"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month, loadpoint)) * -1) /1000, "loadpoint", "series") or label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) * -1) /1000, "series", "Feed-in")

label_set(1 - (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) / ((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) + (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",loadpoint!~"$loadpointBlocklist",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month))), "series", "Autarky") or label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_pv_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) - (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month))) / (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_pv_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)), "series", "Self-consumption")

label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month) - sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_ext_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",title!="",title!~"$extBlocklist",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) / 1000, "series", "Other") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_ext_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",title!="",title!~"$extBlocklist"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month, title)) /1000), "title", "series") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_aux_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",title!="",title!~"$auxBlocklist"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month, title)) /1000), "title", "series")

label_set(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_battery_discharge_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month) ) - (sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_battery_charge_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month))) / 1000, "series", "Battery") or label_set((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_home_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month)) /1000, "series", "Home") or label_copy(((sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_loadpoint_energy_daily_wh{db="$dbLabel",local_year="${__from:date:YYYY}",loadpoint!~"$loadpointBlocklist"}[1d]))[400d:1d])) by (local_month, loadpoint)) /1000), "loadpoint", "series")

panels.title: Heat pump total

panels.description: Estimated share of PV, battery discharge and grid supply for the heat pump loadpoint.

panels.title: Charging stations total

panels.title: Charging stations source mix
panels.description: Estimated share of PV, battery discharge and grid supply for visible charging loadpoints, excluding the heat pump.
Het verbruik wordt pas na meerdere maanden betekenisvol. Extern laden wordt genegeerd en vertekent het resultaat.
panels.title: Voertuigen

panels.description: Kilometers worden alleen geregistreerd terwijl een voertuig is aangesloten. Bij zelden aansluiten kunnen kilometers ontbreken.
panels.title: Maandelijks gereden kilometers

panels.description: Waarden zijn benaderingen. Extern laden is niet inbegrepen en geregistreerde kilometers hangen af van hoe vaak een voertuig is aangesloten.
panels.title: Verbruik (kWh/100km)
